no: Brage NPC - Brage's Redemption main component goes after BG1 Mini Quests and Encounters, before BG1NPC During WeiDU temporary uninstall/reinstall cycles, backup restore produces ~28 'ERROR: error copying' for TRA files. Cause: backup manifest has both lowercase (swordpath.tra) and uppercase (SWORDPATH.TRA) variants — first copy succeeds, second fails on Windows case-insensitive FS. Harmless; all files restore correctly.

conflicts.reason: Install order: Ascalon's Questpack must install BEFORE Brage's Redemption per readme

sum: Expands Brage's redemption quest in BG1 with additional dialogue, encounters, and consequences for your choices about the cursed knight.
